title: Mass layoffs at Xbox cause reactions from studios and developers; Microsoft responds to conspiracy theories
summary: Following the layoffs at several Xbox studios, id Software and Obsidian issue statements, while Microsoft denies rumors about racial or visa-related motives.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced reaches 2 million sales at launch but faces criticism over microtransactions and layoffs at Ubisoft
summary: The remake of Assassin's Creed Black Flag achieves a record of concurrent players on Steam, while Ubisoft defends the game as a complete experience and Barcelona studios announce layoffs after launch.

title: The EU admits it cannot force Sony to keep physical discs, while former PlayStation chief expresses sadness
summary: The European Union declares that companies can decide the distribution format, amid Sony's potential elimination of discs.

title: Video game media share their recommendations and gaming experiences for the weekend
summary: Various publications offer game suggestions and informal chats about what their editors are playing.

title: Soulframe is offered free for a limited time after TennoCon 2026 news
summary: Digital Extremes opens free access to Soulframe, its new fantasy action RPG, with new dark progression and wolf mounts.

title: EA removes microtransactions from College Football 27 after player protest
summary: The company reverses the decision to include in-game payments, arguing they sought to offer more options but will respect the criticism.

title: Palworld modifies the design of its creatures in version 1.0 to move away from Pokémon
summary: The survival game adjusts several creations to avoid similarities with Nintendo's franchise in its major update.

title: God of War Laufey confirms physical disc release and targets 2027
summary: Santa Monica Studio announces that the next installment of God of War will have a physical version, suggesting its release window.

title: Behind the scenes of Nolan's Odyssey: warnings to actors and Matt Damon's reasons for participating
summary: Christopher Nolan warns John Leguizamo before filming, while Matt Damon explains why he agreed to join the cast of the epic.

title: Pokémon Winds and Waves leaks point to a historic Pokédex record that could be unplayable
summary: The leaks suggest that the next generation will include a massive number of Pokémon, possibly saturating the game.

title: The creators of Cyberpunk Edgerunners 2 explain why David Martinez will not return
summary: The protagonist of the first season will not appear in the sequel, according to its creators.

title: Steam generates estimated revenue of $11.1 billion in the first half of the year, its best mark
summary: Valve's platform achieves a record gross revenue in six months, according to a market analyst.

title: The first gameplay of Total War Warhammer 40,000 impresses and worries due to its technical requirements
summary: Creative Assembly's new strategy game shows its graphical potential, which could require powerful hardware.

title: A player wins a legal battle to recover his hacked Xbox account after being forced to repurchase his games
summary: The court rules in favor of the user, setting a precedent on digital rights for players.

title: The next Star Citizen patch will prioritize bug fixes over new content
summary: After criticism, Cloud Imperium Games delays new features to focus on stabilizing the current version.

title: A historic GTA mod thought lost has been rebuilt and fixed 22 years later
summary: A developer has managed to restore a key piece of Grand Theft Auto modding, creating a functional version.

title: Garfield criticizes Mario for the closure of a Mario Kart game
summary: Garfield's official Twitter account mocks the imminent closure of a Mario Kart title.

title: The new Black Ops 2 PC port retains the emblem editor, and players are already creating swastikas
summary: The inclusion of the unrestricted emblem editor allows the creation of offensive symbols, as was foreseeable.

title: Blizzard confirms that a controversial World of Warcraft decision is permanent despite fan anger
summary: The company defends that the change, which has generated criticism, is necessary for the game's long-term health.

title: Minecraft finally adds a long-awaited feature that will enable new creations
summary: After 17 years, the developers incorporate a mechanic that players had been replicating with ingenuity for years.
